title: Incorrect behavior from INT to DATE in EXTRACT and YEARWEEK functions.
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
CREATE TABLE t28 (c1 INT4);
INSERT t28 () VALUES (801085953);
INSERT t28 () VALUES (1201377077);


SELECT * FROM t28 WHERE ((((YEARWEEK((EXTRACT(YEAR_MONTH FROM t28.c1)), 5)) BETWEEN 2 AND (0 > SOME (SELECT 1))) IS UNKNOWN));
-- (1201377077,'RCLmx40OlAXbNm02msvZQ3mYMjS6K')

SELECT YEARWEEK((EXTRACT(YEAR_MONTH FROM t28.c1)), 5) FROM t28;
-- 201997 ，null

SELECT SUM(count) FROM (SELECT (((((YEARWEEK((EXTRACT(YEAR_MONTH FROM t28.c1)), 5)) BETWEEN 2 AND (0 > SOME (SELECT 801085953))) IS UNKNOWN))) IS TRUE AS count FROM t28) AS ta_norec;
-- 2

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
The SELECT YEARWEEK(...) query should return NULL for both rows. The first query should return 2 rows.
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
```shell
mysql> SELECT * FROM t28 WHERE ((((YEARWEEK((EXTRACT(YEAR_MONTH FROM t28.c1)), 5)) BETWEEN 2 AND (0 > SOME (SELECT 1))) IS UNKNOWN));
+------------+
| c1         |
+------------+
| 1201377077 |
+------------+
1 row in set, 2 warnings (0.00 sec)
mysql> SELECT YEARWEEK((EXTRACT(YEAR_MONTH FROM t28.c1)), 5) FROM t28;
+------------------------------------------------+
| YEARWEEK((EXTRACT(YEAR_MONTH FROM t28.c1)), 5) |
+------------------------------------------------+
|                                         201997 |
|                                           NULL |
+------------------------------------------------+
2 rows in set, 1 warning (0.00 sec)

mysql> SELECT SUM(count) FROM (SELECT (((((YEARWEEK((EXTRACT(YEAR_MONTH FROM t28.c1)), 5)) BETWEEN 2 AND (0 > SOME (SELECT 801085953))) IS UNKNOWN))) IS TRUE AS count FROM t28) AS ta_norec;
+------------+
| SUM(count) |
+------------+
|          2 |
+------------+
1 row in set, 4 warnings (0.00 sec)
```
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
Release Version: v8.5.0-20251010-ec6b882
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/commit/ec6b882d188f77c199907ba26843a872b8c5fd6d
Git Branch: heads/refs/tags/v8.5.0-20251010-ec6b882
UTC Build Time: 2025-10-10 10:21:51
GoVersion: go1.23.3
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: unistore
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t29 (c1 INT, c2 DATE, c3 VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO t29 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1201377077, NULL, 'test2');
SELECT c1, YEARWEEK(EXTRACT(YEAR_MONTH FROM c2), 5) FROM t29 WHERE c1 > 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t29 WHERE (YEARWEEK(EXTRACT(YEAR_MONTH FROM c2), 5) IS NULL) OR (c3 IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Incorrect behavior in YEARWEEK and EXTRACT functions
